metadata.name: Docker Healthcheck Audit
metadata.description:
Ansible playbook to audit Docker containers for missing healthchecks and optionally fail when violations are found.

Project: https://www.docker.com
Documentation: https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/builder/#healthcheck
metadata.author: Christian Lempa

variables.name: audit_fail_on_missing
variables.title: Fail When Missing Healthchecks
variables.description: Fail the play if one or more containers are missing a healthcheck

variables.name: audit_save_report
variables.title: Save JSON Report
variables.description: Save audit report to a JSON file on the target host

variables.name: audit_report_path
variables.title: Audit Report Path
variables.description: Path to store the generated JSON report
